titleStmt.title: SII 18.264: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 264. (B.K. No. 140 of 1932-33.) KITTŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab leaning against the front wall of the temple of Saṁgamēśvara

summary.p: This inscription is dated the 19th year of the reign of Rāmadēva, Sarvājit, Mārga s11ira s11u. 7, Thursday, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1287, November 13, Thursday.

It registers a grant of land made by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Jāvugidēva Rāṇeya for the worship and offerings to the gods Kalināthādēva and Mūlasthāna-Jakkēs11varadēva at Hiriya-Kittūr and for feeding the Brahmins and ascetics. The gift was entrusted to Bāchedēva. Hiriya-Kittūr is stated to be situated in Hichageya-nāḍu. Jāvugidēva is given the epithet Chauhāṇa-rāya-rāutta-mōhana.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷaprau
ḍhapratāpacakravartti śrīvīrarāmadēvarāya vijayarājyōda
yada 19 neya sarvvajetusaṁvatsada mārggasira sudha 7 brihaspati
vāradalu svasti śrīmāṇika cauhāṇarāyaruUttamōhanaṁ śrī
manumahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ jāvugidēvarāṇeyaru hicageyanāḍoḷagaṇa
hiriya kittūra śrīkalināthadēvaru mūlasthāna jakkēsvaradēvara Aṁgabhōga dīpavartti
gevu brāhmaṇarigevu tapōdhanarigevu dinaṁprati Ayvarige chatravāgi naḍasabēkeṁ
du biṭṭa bhūmi vuriṁ paḍuvalu gogganūṟa baṭṭeyiṁ teṁkalu mattaru 2 Adaṟiṁ
baḍagalu bhairavadēvarige mattaru 1 dēvakoḍaveya nairuttyada gōṭina moge ma
ttaru 2 dēvara baḍadeseya maḷava Arevattaru doḍḍālada mūḍadese
ya hudōṁṭa jakkēsvaradēvara muḍaṇa mata maṁteda nairityadali mane Ura mūḍa
deseya tuḍike Oṁdu yiṁntidanu sarvvābādhe pariharaveṁdu sarvvamānyavā
gi śrīkalināthana dibyaśrīpādapadmārādhakarappa bācedēvaṁgaḷige dhārāpūrvva kavā
gi biṭṭa dharmma yadanu jāvugidēvarāṇeyara maneya Adhikāri tippeyara kā
ḷiseṭṭi vūroḍeya sōvarasaru boṁmarsaru divakaradēvanu yeṁṭṭuhiṭṭu paṁ
camaṭha samasta prajegaḷuṁ kūḍikoṁḍu dharmmavanu svadharmmadiṁda Ācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ pālisuvaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī . svadataṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rētu vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . dēvabrahma
Digital edition of SII 18.264 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
